ddt:Target.Name: CLUSTER_H45_Ph3_V1.2
ddt:Target.Description:
9th RSM. Seungho Kim [2012.11.19] Add chinese language
8th RSM. Hyounghoon Lee [2012.03.30] Error correction by script V1.5
7th For Ph3, Addition of BSW configuration [2011.10.25] RSM, EEEO, Hyounghoon.LEE
6th For Ph2, addition of some of configuration (2010.08.11) RSM, EEEO,Jaehyeok.Yang 1st; XX4 K.Konishi 2nd: Add Configuration
5th 1)addition of freeshift and OCS configuration (2009,04,06) RSM,AVT, EEEO Dongin KIM
4th 1) Configuration addition( TPMS, ESP, OIL MAINTENANCE, UNIT, OVERSPEED etc...) 2) Modify Screen (2008, 10,09)
3rd Screen ADDED [2008.5.21]
data of "Renault Auto-Itentification Information" was added. Request "OutputControl" was corrected based on Naming rules. 2007/06/13 NISSAN XX4 T.Shida [[2.17]]
This is S-lot version. Later configurations is added.
P32M
Nissan XX4 Kimiyasu Sasaki kim-sasaki@mail.nissan.co.jp
2007/6/22 NISSAN XX4 D.Yumoto

Item.Text: Assembly Line testing and After-Sales Session
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Item.Text: No possible classification about the type of fault
Open circuit or Short circuit to ground
Open circuit or Short circuit to battery

Data.Name: Config Entretien_Odo Update.Restet by DIAG
Data.Comment: Nombre de RAZ de l'odometre general

Data.Name: Config Entretien_Odo Update.Updated by ABS
Data.Comment: Nombre de mise a jour de l'odometre general TdB/ABS

Data.Name: Config Entretien_Oil Draining count.Oil Change Duration
Data.Comment: Valeur courante restante autonomie vidange temps

Data.Name: Config Entretien_Oil Draining init.Oil Change Duration
Config Entretien_Oil Draining init.Oil Change Distance
Data.Comment: Valeur initiale autonomie de vidange en unite distance selectionnee

Data.Name: Config Entretien_Oil Draining count.Oil Change Distance
Data.Comment: Valeur courante restante autonomie vidange en unite distance selectionnee

Item.Text: Device and failure type ODB codding
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or system operation obstructed or blocked

Request.Name: DataRead.Identification.RenaultR2
Request.Comment: ReadDataByLocalIdentifier : Use this request if ECU use Coding Renault R2 or 5DIGITS

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.Mileage
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

DataItem.Name: Config Entretien_Oil Draining init.Oil Change Distance
Config Entretien_Oil Draining count.Oil Change Distance
Config Entretien_Oil Draining init.Oil Change Distance
Config Entretien_Oil Draining count.Oil Change Distance

Display.DataName: Config Entretien_Oil Draining init.Oil Change Distance
Config Entretien_Oil Draining count.Oil Change Distance

Input.DataName: Config Entretien_Oil Draining count.Oil Change Distance
Config Entretien_Oil Draining init.Oil Change Distance
